creator: sunpoet@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Timur I. Bakeyev from comment #2)

> The real fix would be to phase samba46 and samba47 out, as they are not supported anymore.

I patched samba47 because it's still the default samba version, therefore it blocked poudriere builds with -t flag. I would like to see samba48 being the default.
